senses.gloss: having a fixed time or duration, timed

examples.text: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ كَانَتْ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ كِتَابًا مَّوْقُوتًا
examples.english: Indeed, performing prayers is a duty on the believers at the appointed times.

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of وَقَتَ (waqata).
